text: Abhishek Kalyan is an SPS Associate Advisor at Amazon Development Center in Hyderabad with more than 9 years of experience in customer support operations and leadership.
Abhishek progressed through roles including SPS Associate, SPS Mentor, and SPS Associate Advisor.
Abhishek supported 186 associates, helped onboard 26 batches, mentors 30 to 50 associates each year, and has interviewed 18 associates.

Abhishek improved operational metrics including reducing escalations by 30 percent, reducing repeat issues by 20 percent, improving audit adherence by 20 percent, reducing carry forward work by 15 percent, maintaining SLA adherence above 95 percent and quality scores between 99 and 100 percent.
Abhishek handles 40 to 60 customer cases daily while maintaining strict SOP compliance and has handled more than 12,000 escalation contacts through calls, chats and emails.
Abhishek uses SQL, Power BI dashboards, AWS console tools, and operational reporting systems.
Project Velocity reduced backlog by 35 percent and generated approximately 280 thousand dollars in operational savings.
Project Sigma reduced policy deviation rates by 18 percent and delivered approximately 320 thousand dollars in operational savings.
Project Nexus reduced onboarding ramp time by 30 percent through improved training programs.
Abhishek helped launch a global centralized advisor pool model that routes associate questions to the first available advisor globally improving efficiency.
